## Deskripsi

<!-- Jelaskan apa yang diubah dan kenapa -->

Closes #(issue_number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature baru
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 Test

## Checklist

- [ ] Build lulus: `bun run build` atau `npx next build` ✅
- [ ] TypeScript: no `any` tanpa alasan jelas
- [ ] KISS — solusi sesederhana mungkin
- [ ] Nggak ada drive-by refactor (ubah cuma yang perlu)
- [ ] Kalau UI berubah: ada screenshot/recording
